_comment: Contact details (email, phone) are plausible placeholder-format examples for demo purposes only and must be verified before real-world use.

listings.name: Booking.com
listings.description: Booking.com is the world's largest online travel agency for accommodation bookings, offering hotels, apartments, and alternative lodging alongside flights, car rentals, and attractions. It operates a global marketplace connecting millions of properties with travelers worldwide.
usps: Strong brand trust and conversion rates

listings.name: Expedia
listings.description: Expedia is a major online travel agency offering flights, hotels, car rentals, cruises, and vacation packages to consumers worldwide, and is the flagship brand of Expedia Group. It bundles travel products into dynamic packages with rewards for repeat bookings.
usps: Backed by Expedia Group's global supply network

listings.name: MakeMyTrip
listings.description: MakeMyTrip is India's leading online travel company offering flights, hotels, holiday packages, bus, and rail bookings, serving both domestic and outbound Indian travelers. It operates a large ecosystem including MyBiz for corporate travel.
usps: Strong domestic and outbound Indian traveler base

listings.name: Agoda
listings.description: Agoda is an online travel agency, part of Booking Holdings, specializing in accommodation booking with particularly deep inventory across Asia-Pacific destinations. It also offers flights and activities alongside its core hotel booking business.
usps: Strong mobile app engagement in Asia

listings.name: Trip.com
listings.description: Trip.com is the international OTA brand of Trip.com Group (formerly Ctrip), offering flights, hotels, trains, and package tours globally with particular strength in Chinese outbound and Asia-Pacific travel. It provides 24/7 multilingual customer service.
usps: Deep Chinese outbound travel market access
Backed by Trip.com Group's massive Asia supply

listings.name: Cleartrip
listings.description: Cleartrip is an Indian online travel agency offering flights, hotels, and activity bookings, now owned by Flipkart's parent Walmart-linked group, known for a simplified booking interface for domestic and international Indian travelers.
usps: Known for clean, minimalist booking UX

listings.name: Traveloka
listings.description: Traveloka is a Southeast Asian online travel platform offering flights, hotels, activities, and financial services like installment payments, headquartered in Indonesia and serving multiple regional markets. It is one of the largest travel unicorns in the region.

listings.name: Despegar
listings.description: Despegar is the leading online travel agency in Latin America, offering flights, hotels, packages, and car rentals across the region under brands including Decolar in Brazil. It serves both leisure travelers and corporate clients throughout LATAM.
usps: Deep local payment and installment options

listings.name: Yatra
listings.description: Yatra is an Indian online travel company offering flights, hotels, holiday packages, and bus bookings, with a significant focus on corporate travel management through Yatra for Business. It is a publicly listed travel technology player in India.
usps: Strong Indian corporate travel management arm

listings.name: ixigo
listings.description: ixigo is an Indian travel platform specializing in flight, train, and bus fare aggregation and booking, particularly known for its rail booking and PNR prediction tools. It targets budget-conscious domestic Indian travelers.
usps: Popular rail booking and PNR prediction tools
Strong budget traveler focus in India

listings.name: Skyscanner
listings.description: Skyscanner is a global travel metasearch engine that compares flight, hotel, and car rental prices across airlines, OTAs, and travel sites, redirecting users to book with partner providers. It is owned by Trip.com Group and widely used for fare comparison.

listings.name: Kayak
listings.description: Kayak is a travel metasearch engine, part of Booking Holdings, that aggregates flight, hotel, and car rental prices from airlines, OTAs, and other travel sites for consumer comparison shopping. It also offers trip planning and price prediction tools.

listings.name: Google Flights & Hotels
listings.description: Google Flights and Google Hotels are metasearch tools integrated into Google Search that aggregate airline and hotel pricing directly within search results, letting users compare and track fares before booking through partner sites or airline/hotel pages directly.
usps: Free price tracking tools for consumers
Backed by Google's search data and scale

listings.name: eDreams ODIGEO
listings.description: eDreams ODIGEO is a European online travel group operating multiple OTA brands including eDreams, Opodo, GO Voyages, and Travellink, offering flights, hotels, and packages along with its Prime subscription membership program.
usps: Pioneer of OTA subscription membership model (Prime)

listings.name: Almosafer
listings.description: Almosafer is a Saudi Arabia-based online travel agency, part of Seera Group, offering flights, hotels, and holiday packages tailored to Middle Eastern travelers including Hajj and Umrah travel services. It is a leading OTA brand in the Gulf region.
usps: Leading OTA brand in Saudi Arabia/Gulf region
Specialist Hajj and Umrah travel services
Backed by Seera Group's regional travel scale
